title: T. ROWE PRICE GROUP NAMES ERIC VEIEL HEAD OF GLOBAL INVESTMENTS EFFECTIVE JANUARY 1, 2024
text: BALTIMORE , Nov. 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. (NASDAQ-GS: TROW), announced today that Eric Veiel, a chief investment officer and head of Global Equity, has been named head of Global Investments, effective January 1, 2024.

title: IFC, T. Rowe Price to Create First Blue Bond Strategy to Support the Sustainable Blue Economy across Emerging Markets
text: WASHINGTON , Nov. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- IFC, a member of the World Bank Group, and T. Rowe Price today announced plans to create a pioneering global blue bond strategy to increase access to finance for blue projects in emerging markets and help improve market standards for the nascent blue bond market.

title: Why is this mutual fund giant cautious about markets in 2024? T. Rowe Price shares its outlook.
text: Every year around this time, the giant Baltimore-based investment shop T. Rowe Price Group TROW sends investment managers and strategists to New York City to offer a year-ahead outlook on stocks, bonds and the global economy.

title: T. ROWE PRICE EXPERTS SHARE 2024 U.S. RETIREMENT MARKET OUTLOOK
text: Experts discuss the growing demand for innovative retirement income solutions, how personalized experiences can help improve retirement outcomes, the role of public policy, and a sharpened focus on diversification opportunities amid lingering inflation and economic challenges BALTIMORE , Nov. 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- T. Rowe Price, a global investment management firm and a leader in retirement, held its annual U.S. Retirement Market Outlook press briefing yesterday, offering research-based insights on major themes expected to shape the retirement landscape in 2024.

title: T. ROWE PRICE EXPERTS SHARE 2024 OUTLOOK FOR GLOBAL FINANCIAL MARKETS
text: New regime of "higher for longer" inflation, elevated interest rates, and slower economic growth are setting the context for stock and bond markets BALTIMORE , Nov. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- T. Rowe Price held its 41st annual global market outlook press briefing today in New York City, with a panel of the firm's experts sharing their expectations for global financial markets in 2024.

title: T. Rowe Price's (TROW) October AUM Declines on Weak Markets
text: T. Rowe Price's (TROW) October AUM decreases 2.5% to $1.31 trillion due to unfavorable market conditions.

title: T. ROWE PRICE GROUP REPORTS PRELIMINARY MONTH-END ASSETS UNDER MANAGEMENT FOR OCTOBER 2023
text: BALTIMORE , Nov. 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. (NASDAQ-GS: TROW), today reported preliminary month-end assets under management of $1.31 trillion as of October 31, 2023.

title: T. ROWE PRICE GROUP ADDS BILL DONNELLY AS INDEPENDENT DIRECTOR
text: BALTIMORE , Nov. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. (NASDAQ-GS: TROW), announced today that its Board of Directors has elected Bill Donnelly as an independent director of the company.
